title: The Raid on Onigashima Begins
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Kaido, Unknown person #10, Luffy, Kid, Unknown person #11 as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: This is turning into a pain!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Are all of them smile users!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then let's get these guys outta the way and get inside!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lemme tune you in to some fighting music!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What was that!? How'd he hit me....!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where's his blade!? And I couldn't even see the attack!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What kind of power is that!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, C'mon! You're supposed to be giving us a good show!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 26 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
